title: Benefits
text:
If you become an NLR employee, you'll reap many benefits, not just health care.
NLR is dedicated to evaluating and compensating employees fairly, supporting employees in professional growth and development, assisting with personal or professional concerns, and rewarding employees for exceptional work.
Benefits Package
NLR's benefits package for full- and part-time employees includes medical, dental, and vision coverage effective the first of the month following the date of hire.
Employees with an initial assignment of 12 months or longer may receive the following, based on eligibility:
Medical/dental insurance
Vision coverage
Critical illness insurance
Accident insurance
Personal time off
Basic and supplemental life insurance
Basic and supplemental accidental death and dismemberment insurance
Extended sick leave
Short-term and long-term disability
403(b) Employee Savings Plan with employer match
Pension benefits (based on eligibility rules).
Positions with initial assignments of 12 months or longer may also be eligible for relocation benefits.
Additional Perks
We also offer:
An employee assistance program with confidential counseling and referral services
Tuition reimbursement
Training and development programs
On-site wellness activities, including health coaching, fitness rooms, aerobics, and yoga
Flexible schedules
Business casual dress
Free RTD EcoPass for Denver's transit system.
Benefits You Can Feel
At NRL, you can make a difference every day and contribute to creating a better world for future generations. To name a few of these intangible bonuses, we pride ourselves on:
